deviations.what: openTimePicker (byId('HiddenTP').openBy(source.getDomRef())) is the app-016 openBy pattern: the source sId is transported via $event.oSource.sId and replayed as a control_by_id/openBy follow-up action.
Button.ariaHasPopup (since 1.84), Link.ariaHasPopup (since 1.86) and TimePicker.hideInput (since 1.97) are kept 1:1; needs a UI5 release providing them.
